title: Usopp Hears the Worst
description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Kaku, Usopp, Zoro. Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shut up! What are you looking at!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: the money.... they took it... Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: We will definitely get our money back!!

summary: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
